name: Heard A.M.E.
description_short: Priority Trust Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering competitive auto loans, personal loans, mortgages, credit cards, and savings products with rates starting at 4.05% APR for auto financing.
description_long:
Priority Trust Credit Union is a federally-insured credit union celebrating its 96th annual meeting as of 2024, operating as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution. The organization has evolved from its historical roots (evidenced by mentions of legacy HMFCU branding) to become Priority Trust, maintaining NCUA insurance protections typical of credit unions. The credit union serves members seeking alternatives to traditional banks with cooperative ownership models and member-focused services.

Priority Trust provides a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts, personal signature loans, lines of credit, auto financing (new and used vehicles 2018+), motorcycle loans, RV/camper financing, ATV loans, credit cards (Platinum Rewards Visa and Secured Visa), mortgages through Member Home Loans partnership, and insurance services. They advertise competitive auto loan rates starting as low as 4.05% APR with flexible terms up to 84 months. The credit union also operates a Member Auto Center, preferred dealer network partnerships for vehicle shopping, and provides financial education resources to members.

Priority Trust distinguishes itself through its preferred dealer network partnerships, personalized auto buying services, and tiered loan products including a "Second Chance" lending program for members with credit challenges. The institution emphasizes member education, fraud prevention awareness (recent alerts about fake cashier's checks), and flexible financing options across multiple asset classes. Their rate structure includes available discounts for automatic payments (0.25%) and down payments of 20% or more (0.50%), and they partner with external providers like Enterprise Car Sales for vehicle procurement.

However, the available information reveals limited transparency about membership requirements, account minimums, or digital banking capabilities. Personal loan rates range from 9% to 18% depending on product tier, which is moderate but not necessarily best-in-market. The website provides rates pages but lacks detail on underwriting standards, approval timelines, or member service hours. Like all credit unions, membership eligibility may be restricted by geography, employer, or organizational affiliation, though specific eligibility criteria are not stated on the provided pages.
services: Auto loans for new and used vehicles (2018+) at rates 4.75%-17.99% APR
Personal signature loans up to 60 months at 9.00%-15.99% APR
Second Chance signature loans and lines of credit for credit rebuilding at 18% APR
Lines of credit up to 60 months at 11.99%-15.99% APR
Checking and savings accounts with competitive rates
Mortgages through Member Home Loans partnership
Platinum Rewards Visa and Secured Visa credit cards
Motorcycle loans up to 72 months at 6.45%-17.99% APR
ATV and 4-wheeler loans up to 60 months at 7.00%-15.99% APR
Member Auto Center with preferred dealer network partnerships
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 4.05% APR with terms up to 84 months for 2018+ vehicles
Second Chance lending products (signature loans and lines of credit) for members rebuilding credit, available up to 18-24 months
Comprehensive product suite including mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, credit cards, and insurance in one institution
Partnership with Member Home Loans for mortgage products and preferred dealer network for vehicle shopping convenience
Active member communication and fraud prevention alerts (recent scam warnings about fake cashier's checks)
Multiple rate discounts available: 0.25% for automatic payments and 0.50% for 20%+ down payments on auto loans
96-year operating history demonstrating institutional stability and member loyalty
cons: Personal loan APRs range 9-18%, competitive but not exceptional compared to some online lenders for well-qualified borrowers
Second Chance loans carry 18% APR flat rate with mandatory automatic payment and up to $500 pledge requirement
Membership eligibility not clearly stated on provided pages—may have geographic, employer, or organizational restrictions typical of credit unions
Limited information about account minimums, digital banking capabilities, mobile app features, or service hours
Credit card APRs starting at 12.25% for rewards card are in the higher range compared to premium credit card market
best_for: Members seeking competitive auto financing with rates as low as 4.05% APR and flexible repayment terms
Individuals with fair or rebuilding credit who qualify for Second Chance loan products at transparent fixed rates
Credit union members already eligible who want one-stop financial services (checking, savings, loans, mortgages, insurance)
Vehicle buyers who benefit from the preferred dealer network partnerships and member auto buying assistance
diagnosis: Priority Trust Credit Union is best for members who already have or can establish membership eligibility and seek competitive auto financing, comprehensive financial products, and credit-building options in a not-for-profit cooperative structure. The main caveat is that membership restrictions (eligibility not detailed on provided pages) and limited digital banking information mean prospective members must verify they qualify before applying, and should compare auto loan rates with online lenders if they have strong credit profiles.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Heard A.m.e. — NCUA-insured credit union in ROSELLE, NJ. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
